chatty-edu.description: Chatty-EDU is a modular, local-first education assistant designed to run on-device for school trust and deployment clarity. No cloud dependency, no accounts, no tracking.

chatty-edu-user.description: First public user-focused Chatty-EDU release, aligned with source v0.4. Prebuilt Windows app for click-and-run use, offline-first by default with local data and no accounts.
